_comment: Intentional backlog runner model mappings. Codex main and pass runs both resolve to gpt-5.4.

model_crosswalk._comment: Cross-tool fallbacks for the current supported Claude aliases and the default Codex model.

_notes.claude: See: claude --model <alias|name>. Aliases: sonnet, opus, haiku.
_notes.codex: See: codex exec --model <name>. Backlog runner main and pass models intentionally use gpt-5.4.
